_comment: Coordinates in pixels. Adjust by visual inspection of debug_overlay.png and debug_reference.png.

reference_crop._comment: Reference is now pre-cropped — use whole image (set x1=y1=0, x2=y2=null to mean full size).

puzzle_slots._comment: 3x3 grid of slot bounding boxes inside puzzle-solved-1.jpeg. Order: row-major, top-left to bottom-right.

thresholds._comment: ORB RANSAC inliers is the sole primary signal. 9/9 diagonal wins in confusion test. Weakest slot scored 13; pick ~10 with margin.
